title: kaempferia alboviolacea
intro: Kaempferia alboviolacea, also known as Thai Angelica or White Blue Ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family, Zingiberaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in Thailand, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Kaempferia alboviolacea include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Kaempferia alboviolacea is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be added to soups and stir-fries for its flavor and medicinal properties.
